title: Be able to restrict access to Mass Email functionality
excerpt: Have a permission that we can use to hide the mass email button from most of but not all our users

posts.author: lee.dowsett (Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: Have a permission that we can use to hide the mass email button from most of but not all our users

posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
